channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: South Carolina Measles Outbreak Ends; Vaccination Rates Show Early Increase
item.description: South Carolina has officially ended its largest measles outbreak in decades, with nearly 1,000 confirmed cases and 21 hospitalizations over six months. No new cases have been reported for more than 42...

item.title: Critical Equipment and Maintenance Gaps Identified at Sindh’s Second Largest Hospital
item.description: During a recent inspection of Liaquat University Hospital, Hyderabad, it was revealed that 45 vital medical machines, including MRI, CT scan, X-ray, ultrasound, and anesthesia units, are non-functiona...

item.title: Injured Great Horned Owl in Innisfil Recovered and Released After Month-Long Rehab
item.description: A Great Horned Owl found injured in Innisfil has made a remarkable recovery after a month of rehabilitation. The owl, which was discovered with injuries, was treated by wildlife professionals and give...

item.title: Seven AAP MPs merge with BJP in Rajya Sabha, boosting BJP's strength to 113
item.description: In a significant development in Indian politics, the Chairperson of Rajya Sabha, CP Radhakrishnan, has officially accepted the merger of the Aam Aadmi Party's legislature party with the Bharatiya Jana...

item.title: Saskatoon coffee shops maintain strong customer support amid rising prices
item.description: Specialty coffee shops in Saskatoon are seeing continued success despite rising prices over the last two decades, with the cost of coffee increasing by 81 per cent. Kim Rashley-Anton, co-owner of McQu...

item.title: PNPA Implements Monthly Body Checks to Prevent Hazing Among Cadets
item.description: The Philippine National Police Academy (PNPA) announced that it will start conducting regular body checks on its cadets to prevent hazing and other forms of abuse. According to PNP spokesperson Police...

item.title: Architects and Interior Designers Critique Proposed Trump Presidential Library Design in Miami
item.description: A rendering of the proposed Donald J. Trump Presidential Library in Miami has sparked strong reactions from architects and interior designers. The design features a towering skyscraper with extensive ...

item.title: FCC Temporarily Restores Govt's Authority to Inactivate Passports Pending Final Verdict
item.description: ISLAMABAD – The Federal Constitutional Court (FCC) on Monday put on hold the Lahore High Court’s decision from December 2025 that had struck down key provisions of the Passport Rules 2021, which allow...

item.title: TFRA Urges Kilimanjaro Farmers to Prioritise Fertiliser Nutrients Over Brand Names
item.description: The Tanzania Fertiliser Regulatory Authority (TFRA) has advised farmers in Kilimanjaro Region to stop focusing too much on specific fertiliser brand names and instead pay attention to the nutrients th...

item.title: Chande Commission Report Highlights Path for Political Reform and Reconciliation in Tanzania
item.description: The Chande Commission, led by Retired Chief Justice Mohamed Chande Othman, submitted its report to President Samia Suluhu Hassan on April 23, 2026, after over 150 days of investigation into post-elect...

item.title: US Extends Waiver Allowing Philippines to Purchase Russian Oil Until May 16
item.description: The United States has extended a waiver that allows the Philippines to continue purchasing Russian oil. The waiver, which was granted by the US Department of Energy, is effective from April 17 to May ...

item.title: Recognizing the Hidden Abnormalities of Modern Society
item.description: This article explores the pervasive sense of unease in contemporary society, emphasizing how many aspects of modern life feel unnatural and morally distorted. It argues that humans instinctively recog...

item.title: KP CM Afridi Holds Key Meeting with TTAP Leaders Amid Tensions Within Opposition

item.title: Tanzania's Mobile Networks Meet Quality Standards Amid Other Sector Gaps
item.description: Most mobile communication service providers in Tanzania are performing well, meeting the quality standards set by the Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority (TCRA). The latest report for the per...

item.title: EAC urges citizens to embrace East African identity for stronger regional unity
item.description: For sure, the East African Community (EAC) dey push citizens make dem see demself first as East Africans instead of just their own countries. This move dey seen as important to make the region stronge...

item.title: Lahore High Court Refers Punjab Defamation Law Petitions to Chief Justice for Bench Decision
item.description: On Monday, Justice Anwaar Hussain of Lahore High Court directed that several petitions challenging the Punjab Defamation Act 2024 be sent to the LHC Chief Justice after the provincial government's cou...

item.title: Rural Tanzanian Mothers Struggle with 'Free' Maternal Healthcare Due to Hidden Costs
item.description: In rural Tanzania, the government’s policy of free maternal care for expectant mothers and children under five is not always being implemented as expected. Mothers like Furaha from Iwemba Village in K...

item.title: TWS Focuses on Growth and Authenticity Beyond Viral Fame
item.description: The article highlights the rising K-pop group TWS and their efforts to move beyond the initial wave of viral success that brought them into the spotlight. While their popularity has been boosted by on...

item.title: Cardoso criticises pitch conditions after Sundowns’ goalless draw with Richards Bay
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns coach Miguel Cardoso expressed his frustration following a scoreless draw against Richards Bay at the Richards Bay Stadium, highlighting the impact of the dry pitch on the game. Sund...

item.title: California Man Accused of Targeting Trump at Press Dinner to Face Court
item.description: A man from California is set to appear in court after being accused of opening fire at a gala dinner attended by former President Donald Trump. The incident took place at the Washington Hilton hotel d...
